ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Setup.Kingsbridge_General_Custom_Setting__c.Validation_Rule__c = False, $User.Alias <> 'IntUser', $User.Alias <> 'guest', ISCHANGED(Status), ISPICKVAL(Status,"Unqualified"), OR( ISPICKVAL (Reason_Lost__c, 'Product unsuitable'), ISPICKVAL (Reason_Lost__c, 'Product unsuitable:ROI')), ISBLANK( TEXT(Reason_Products_Unsuitable__c )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: LV2: A Reason Products Unsuitable is Required
